title: Issues
scope: Bug and feature-request tracker: family members report issues, the developer triages and resolves them, and reporters validate fixes. A required core app (the Evolve engine reads from it). NOT the external GitHub issue queue — this is the in-platform tester-facing tracker.

specs.title: Report an issue
specs.behavior: Reporting records a bug or feature request from a family member.

specs.title: List issues
specs.behavior: Listing returns reported issues with their statuses.

specs.title: Get an issue
specs.behavior: Getting returns the full detail of a single issue.

specs.title: Triage / resolve an issue
specs.behavior: Updating changes an issue's status as the developer triages and resolves it.

specs.title: Nudge an issue
specs.behavior: Nudging pings the relevant party about an open issue.
